layout.safe_zone: leave clean negative space on the right third for title overlay
layout.composition: soft editorial composition with one clear focal subject and minimal background clutter

prompt_rules: avoid text, letters, logos and watermarks inside the image
prefer soft daylight, pastel surfaces, calm body language
use consistent lens feel and color grading across the full series
show women-centered, supportive, modern healthcare context where relevant
keep images suitable for website hero/header use
style_anchor: A calm digital-health editorial style for women's health: soft pastel palette, clean backgrounds, subtle texture, gentle natural light, compassionate modern healthcare mood, premium but approachable, minimal clutter, visually consistent across a whole blog series.
